research_sources: MetaBlooms OS v10 docs/MPP_PROTOCOL.md (Stage 1 SEE, Stage 2 MMD)
ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in LLMs (Yao et al. ICLR 2023)
Let's Verify Step by Step (Lightman et al. 2023)
provenance.notes: Required by CARTRIDGE_GENERATOR Stage 1. Governs all research operations across every domain. No cartridge can be generated without this cartridge active. Load after PYTHON_CODE_QUALITY.

domain_knowledge.source: Extracted from WEB_SEE_ENGINE.py, SEE_QUERIES.json, MPP Stage 1-2, MS-SEE-001, MS-SEE-002
domain_knowledge.summary: Evidence gathering methodology for MetaBlooms OS. Covers three evidence dimensions (theory/implementation/failure_modes), five evidence classifications (E0-E4), credibility scoring by source type, contradiction detection, citation graph construction, and minimum confidence thresholds. Grounded in ReAct, REST meets ReAct, and empirical MetaBlooms session data.

expert_lenses.big_idea: Evidence must precede every claim. A claim without a source URL and SHA-256 hash is an assertion. Assertions are not evidence. Research fails closed — partial evidence is worse than no evidence because it creates false confidence.
unanswered_questions: Has every evidence dimension (theory, implementation, failure_modes) been filled with substantive content?
Is the evidence confidence above the 0.15 minimum threshold?
Are source URLs verifiable and content hashes computed over actual fetched bytes?
Have contradictions between sources been detected and documented?
expert_lenses.ethics: Fabricated evidence is the worst research failure. A source URL that returns 404 must be reported as MISSING, not silently replaced with generated content. The caller must know when evidence is real vs derived. SHA-256 over actual bytes is the proof of realness.
expert_lenses.patterns: World-class research in MetaBlooms: 5-7 parallel queries with meaningfully different keyword strategies, three dimensions always covered, source credibility scored by type (docs=0.95, standard=0.90, package=0.80, code_repo=0.75, issue=0.70), fallback chain for rate-limited APIs, contradiction detection between same-type sources.
expert_lenses.change_over_time: MetaBlooms SEE evolved from LOCAL_SEE (stub pattern-matcher) through WEB_SEE_ENGINE v1 (real HTTP, single query) to v10 (three dimensions, citation graph, contradiction detection, confidence scoring, fallback chains). Each version closed a class of fabricated evidence.
across_disciplines: Epistemology (justified true belief — what counts as knowing)
Investigative journalism (source verification, multiple independent sources)
Legal evidence (chain of custody, verifiable provenance)
expert_lenses.multiple_perspectives: Speed vs rigor: fast research skips contradiction detection and confidence thresholds. Rigorous research requires all three dimensions, real hashes, and minimum confidence. MetaBlooms chooses rigor — a slow correct build beats a fast wrong one.
expert_lenses.details_vs_big_picture: Zoom in: every receipt needs a SHA-256 hash over actual fetched bytes, not generated content. Zoom out: the research pipeline is the foundation — if it is weak, every cartridge built on it is weak.
expert_lenses.rules_vs_exceptions: Three dimensions required: no exceptions. SHA-256 over actual bytes: no exceptions. Confidence >= 0.15: no exceptions. Rate limit fallback chain IS the exception handling — use it rather than failing on first 403.
expert_lenses.proof: Proof of quality research: three dimensions filled, evidence_confidence >= 0.15, all source URLs return 200 or documented fallback used, SHA-256 computed over actual bytes, contradiction_count documented.

scoring_tiers.S: All three evidence dimensions filled with substantive content. Confidence >= 0.50. All source URLs verified (200 or documented fallback). SHA-256 on every receipt. Contradiction detection run. 5+ unique sources.
scoring_tiers.A: All three dimensions filled. Confidence >= 0.30. At least one real URL per dimension. SHA-256 present. Minor gap (e.g. one fallback used).
scoring_tiers.B: Two of three dimensions filled. Confidence >= 0.15. Some real sources. SHA-256 present. One dimension derived rather than fetched.
scoring_tiers.C: One dimension filled or confidence < 0.15. Evidence quality too low to support downstream cartridge generation. Do not proceed.
scoring_tiers.F: Zero real sources fetched. Fabricated evidence present. No SHA-256 on receipts. Evidence confidence == 0.0. Hard block — CARTRIDGE_GENERATOR must not proceed.

criteria.name: THREE_DIMENSIONS_COVERED
criteria.description: All three evidence dimensions present in receipts: theory, implementation, failure_modes. Each must have substantive content (>= 15 words).
criteria.s_tier_signal: All three dimensions present, each with >= 100 words of substantive content and a real source URL.
criteria.f_tier_signal: Zero dimensions filled or evidence is entirely fabricated. Linked: ME-RES-001 (DIMENSION_MISSING).

criteria.name: SHA256_ON_ALL_RECEIPTS
criteria.description: Every evidence receipt has content_hash (SHA-256 of actual fetched bytes) and result_hash (SHA-256 of summarized content). Neither field is empty string.
criteria.s_tier_signal: All receipts have non-empty content_hash and result_hash. Hashes computed over actual bytes not generated strings.
criteria.f_tier_signal: Any receipt with empty hash fields or hash computed over generated content. Linked: ME-RES-002 (FABRICATED_HASH).

criteria.name: CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD_MET
criteria.description: evidence_confidence >= 0.15 (minimum) across all receipts. Confidence is computed from node count, average credibility, and contradiction penalty.
criteria.s_tier_signal: evidence_confidence >= 0.50. 5+ evidence nodes. Low contradiction count.
criteria.f_tier_signal: evidence_confidence < 0.15. Pipeline must not proceed. Linked: ME-RES-003 (LOW_CONFIDENCE_EVIDENCE).

criteria.name: SOURCE_VERIFIABILITY
criteria.description: Every receipt has a source_url that either returned HTTP 200 or has a documented fallback reason. No receipt source_url is empty or fabricated.
criteria.s_tier_signal: All source_urls returned 200 or fallback is explicitly documented with reason. fetch_status recorded on every receipt.
criteria.f_tier_signal: Any receipt with empty source_url or undocumented fallback. Linked: ME-RES-004 (UNVERIFIABLE_SOURCE).

criteria.name: CONTRADICTION_DETECTION_RUN
criteria.description: Citation graph has been built and contradiction detection has been run. contradiction_count is present on all receipts (0 is valid — absence of the field is not).
criteria.s_tier_signal: citation_graph present on all receipts. contradiction_count field present. Any contradictions documented with interpretation.
criteria.f_tier_signal: No citation_graph built. Contradiction detection skipped. Linked: ME-RES-005 (CONTRADICTION_SKIPPED).

mistake_classes.name: DIMENSION_MISSING
mistake_classes.description: One or more of the three required evidence dimensions (theory, implementation, failure_modes) was not filled with substantive content. Pipeline proceeded on incomplete evidence.
mistake_classes.detection: Check receipts list — must contain exactly three entries with dimensions: theory, implementation, failure_modes. Each must have result with >= 15 words.
mistake_classes.recovery: Retry the missing dimension with different queries. Use fallback sources (PyPI, PEP index). If all fallbacks fail: raise WEB_SEE_DIMENSION_MISSING and abort.

mistake_classes.name: FABRICATED_HASH
mistake_classes.description: SHA-256 hash computed over generated/fabricated content rather than actual fetched bytes. Looks like real evidence but is not verifiable.
mistake_classes.detection: content_hash must be SHA-256 of raw HTTP response bytes. result_hash must be SHA-256 of the summarized string. Neither should be SHA-256 of placeholder text.
mistake_classes.recovery: Re-fetch. Compute hash over response.content (bytes), not over generated summary. If fetch fails: mark dimension MISSING, do not fabricate.

mistake_classes.name: LOW_CONFIDENCE_EVIDENCE
mistake_classes.description: Evidence confidence below 0.15 threshold. Proceeding builds cartridge on insufficient foundation. Every downstream artifact inherits this weakness.
mistake_classes.detection: evidence_confidence field on any receipt < 0.15. Or all_nodes count < 2.
mistake_classes.recovery: Expand query diversity — use 5-7 different keyword strategies. Add more source types. If confidence still < 0.15 after 3 attempts: abort with WEB_SEE_LOW_CONFIDENCE.

mistake_classes.name: UNVERIFIABLE_SOURCE
mistake_classes.description: Receipt source_url is empty, points to a URL that returned non-200, or is documented as local: without explicit fallback justification.
mistake_classes.detection: source_url empty string or fetch_status != 200 without documented fallback_reason field.
mistake_classes.recovery: Document fallback: add fallback_reason field explaining why real source unavailable and what derived source was used instead. Never leave source_url empty.

mistake_classes.name: CONTRADICTION_SKIPPED
mistake_classes.description: Citation graph not built or contradiction detection not run. Conflicting sources silently passed to downstream stages.
mistake_classes.detection: citation_graph field absent from receipts. contradiction_count field absent.
mistake_classes.recovery: Run _detect_contradictions() on all_nodes before building receipts. Attach graph_dict to every receipt.

mistake_classes.name: SINGLE_QUERY_ONLY
mistake_classes.description: Only one search query used for entire domain. Research breadth insufficient — single query misses entire sub-domains of knowledge.
mistake_classes.detection: research_queries in cartridge has fewer than 3 entries. WEB_SEE_ENGINE called with single keyword set.
mistake_classes.recovery: Apply MS-SEE-002 (RECURSIVE_MULTI_QUERY_SEARCH): generate 5-7 queries with meaningfully different keyword strategies. Cross-reference findings.

mistake_classes.name: RATE_LIMIT_ABORT
mistake_classes.description: Research aborted on first 403 from GitHub without attempting fallback chain. Unnecessary failure — fallback sources available.
mistake_classes.detection: WEB_SEE_IMPL_MISSING raised with GitHub 403 as reason but PyPI and PEP fallbacks not attempted.
mistake_classes.recovery: Follow fallback chain: GitHub → PyPI → PEP index → MISTAKE_REGISTRY derived. Only abort if all four fail.

success_patterns.name: THREE_DIMENSION_COVERAGE
success_patterns.description: Always fill all three evidence dimensions before proceeding. Theory grounds the what. Implementation grounds the how. Failure modes ground the what-can-go-wrong.
protocol: 1. Theory: fetch from official docs, standards, academic papers
2. Implementation: fetch from GitHub repos, PyPI packages, PEP standards
3. Failure modes: fetch from GitHub issues, bug reports, MISTAKE_REGISTRY
4. If any dimension fails: use documented fallback, never skip silently
5. Record fetch_status and source_url on every receipt
success_patterns.research_basis: ReAct (Yao et al. ICLR 2023) — interleaving reasoning with real web evidence. MPP Stage 1 SEE three-dimension model.

success_patterns.name: HASH_OVER_BYTES_NOT_STRINGS
success_patterns.description: SHA-256 always computed over raw response bytes (response.content), not over Python strings or generated summaries. Bytes are the proof of fetch.
protocol: 1. raw = response.content  # bytes, not .text
2. content_hash = hashlib.sha256(raw).hexdigest()
3. Store content_hash in receipt before any processing
4. result_hash = hashlib.sha256(summary_string.encode()).hexdigest()
5. Both fields required on every receipt
success_patterns.research_basis: Let's Verify Step by Step (Lightman et al. 2023) — step-level verification. MetaBlooms CS-008 (SHA256_ON_ALL_ARTIFACTS).

success_patterns.name: RECURSIVE_MULTI_QUERY_SEARCH
success_patterns.description: Run 5-7 parallel searches with meaningfully different keyword strategies. Cross-reference findings. This is MS-SEE-002 promoted to the research cartridge.
protocol: 1. Generate queries: domain fundamentals, quality signals, failure patterns, expert vocabulary, cross-domain connections
2. Each query uses different keyword strategy — not just synonyms
3. Cross-reference: findings that appear in 3+ sources are high-confidence
4. Findings in only 1 source: flag as single-source, lower confidence weight
5. Document query list in cartridge research_queries field
success_patterns.research_basis: MetaBlooms MS-SEE-002 (RECURSIVE_MULTI_QUERY_SEARCH) — proven in 60+ build sessions.

success_patterns.name: DOCUMENT_FALLBACK_EXPLICITLY
success_patterns.description: When real source unavailable, document exactly what fallback was used and why. Caller can then evaluate evidence quality appropriately.
protocol: 1. First attempt: real URL fetch
2. If 403/timeout: log "FALLBACK: GitHub rate limited, trying PyPI"
3. Add fallback_reason field to receipt: "GitHub 403 — used PyPI package info"
4. Never leave source_url empty — use "local:FALLBACK_SOURCE_NAME"
5. Set fetch_status to 0 for derived content (not fabricated, derived)
success_patterns.research_basis: MetaBlooms WEB_SEE_ENGINE fallback chain implementation — tested across GitHub/PyPI/PEP fallback scenarios.

success_patterns.name: CITATION_GRAPH_ALWAYS
success_patterns.description: Build citation graph on every research run. Contradiction detection is only valuable if it actually runs.
protocol: 1. Collect all EvidenceNodes across all dimensions into all_nodes list
2. Run _detect_contradictions(all_nodes) before building receipts
3. Compute confidence score: base * avg_credibility - contradiction_penalty
4. Attach citation_graph dict to every receipt
5. Log contradiction_count even when 0 — absence of field is not the same as zero contradictions
success_patterns.research_basis: MetaBlooms WEB_SEE_ENGINE citation graph implementation. Epistemological principle: contradictions must be surfaced, not buried.

artifact_types.description: A MetaBlooms evidence receipt from WEB_SEE_ENGINE. Contains dimension, result, result_hash, content_hash, source_url, fetch_status, citation_graph, evidence_confidence.
A discrete fact extracted from research. Has source URL, content hash, credibility score, and source type.

domain_stages.name: QUERY_GENERATION
domain_stages.description: Generate 5-7 research queries from domain_request with different keyword strategies. Minimum 3 queries covering: fundamentals, quality signals, failure patterns.

domain_stages.name: DIMENSION_FETCH
domain_stages.description: Fetch all three dimensions (theory, implementation, failure_modes). Apply fallback chain on failure. Compute SHA-256 over raw bytes on every fetch.

domain_stages.name: CITATION_GRAPH_BUILD
domain_stages.description: Collect all EvidenceNodes. Run contradiction detection. Compute confidence score. Attach graph to all receipts.

domain_stages.name: CONFIDENCE_GATE
domain_stages.description: Verify evidence_confidence >= 0.15. If below threshold: retry with expanded queries. If still below after 3 attempts: abort WEB_SEE_LOW_CONFIDENCE.

domain_stages.name: RECEIPT_VALIDATION
domain_stages.description: Verify all receipts have: non-empty content_hash, result_hash, source_url, fetch_status, citation_graph, evidence_confidence, contradiction_count.

research_queries: web search evidence gathering LLM grounding ReAct reasoning acting 2023
information retrieval credibility scoring source verification research quality
SHA-256 content integrity verification chain of custody digital evidence
contradiction detection conflicting sources research synthesis methodology
Python web scraping HTTP fetch rate limiting fallback strategies
citation graph knowledge graph evidence nodes links research pipeline

fmea.failure_mode: Evidence dimension fabricated when fetch fails
fmea.effect: Cartridge built on invented facts. Every downstream artifact inherits fabricated foundation.
fmea.mitigation: ME-RES-002 (FABRICATED_HASH). SHA-256 over raw bytes — fabricated content produces hash that does not match any real URL. WEB_SEE_ENGINE fail-closed: missing dimension raises RuntimeError.

fmea.failure_mode: Single query used for entire domain research
fmea.effect: Entire sub-domains missed. Cartridge has blind spots that compound into missing mistake classes.
fmea.mitigation: ME-RES-006 (SINGLE_QUERY_ONLY). MS-RES-003 (RECURSIVE_MULTI_QUERY_SEARCH). CARTRIDGE_GENERATOR Stage 1 requires minimum 5 queries.

fmea.effect: Cartridge rubric criteria and mistake classes not grounded in real evidence. FORGE scores artifacts against weak criteria.
fmea.mitigation: ME-RES-003 (LOW_CONFIDENCE_EVIDENCE). Confidence gate in Stage 4: abort if < 0.15 after 3 attempts.

fmea.failure_mode: GitHub rate limit causes research abort without fallback
fmea.effect: Implementation dimension missing. CARTRIDGE_GENERATOR Stage 1 fails unnecessarily.
fmea.mitigation: ME-RES-007 (RATE_LIMIT_ABORT). MS-RES-004 (DOCUMENT_FALLBACK_EXPLICITLY). Fallback chain: GitHub → PyPI → PEP index → MISTAKE_REGISTRY.

fmea.effect: Downstream stages receive conflicting facts as if they are consensus. Cartridge mistake classes may contradict each other.
fmea.mitigation: ME-RES-005 (CONTRADICTION_SKIPPED). MS-RES-005 (CITATION_GRAPH_ALWAYS). contradiction_count required field on every receipt.

dok_descriptors.1: Recall: name the three evidence dimensions, identify a valid source type, recall minimum confidence threshold (0.15).
dok_descriptors.2: Apply: run WEB_SEE_ENGINE on a domain request, compute SHA-256 on fetched bytes, use fallback chain when GitHub returns 403.
dok_descriptors.3: Analyze: evaluate evidence quality across dimensions, detect contradictions, design a 5-query research strategy for a novel domain, debug a low-confidence result.
dok_descriptors.4: Extend: design a new source type with credibility scoring, add a new evidence dimension, propose a new contradiction detection heuristic, derive FMEA from research failures.
